data.title: Jensen Huang Turned The Tide With Mar-A-Lago Dinner? Trump Administration Reportedly Backs Down On H20 Chip China Export Restrictions
data.description: Nvidia's stock has dropped 17.34% year-to-date, but the company has seen a reversal of planned export restrictions on its H20 AI chips to China after CEO Jensen Huang met with former President Trump at Mar-a-Lago.

data.title: Harley-Davidson Boardroom Turmoil: Director Resigns, Demands CEO Jochen Zeitz Step Down Over 'Cultural Depletion' And Brand Decline
data.description: A director representing Harley-Davidson Inc.'s second-largest shareholder has resigned from the company's board, leveling serious accusations against CEO Jochen Zeitz and other leaders amid ongoing financial challenges for the motorcycle manufacturer.

data.title: Jack Dorsey's Block Is Making It Easy For Companies To Manage Their Bitcoin Treasury—Here's How
data.description: Fintech firm Block, Inc. (NYSE:XYZ) launched a new dashboard Wednesday to help companies effectively manage their Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) holdings.

data.title: Former Vice President Mike Pence Calls Trump's Tariff Moves 'Misstep,' Cites Potential Economic Harm To Working Families
data.description: Mike Pence warned that Trump's tariffs could hurt Republicans in midterms. He praised some decisions but called tariffs a misstep.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Starts Selling In Saudi Arabia Amid Declining Sales In Europe: Charging Network, Low Demand Could Be A Concern
data.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) will begin sales in Saudi Arabia on April 10, 2025, showcasing its lineup of vehicles and humanoid robots.
